expectations.evidence: Enumerated 8 ADRs with TR-NN ties before producing the manifest.
gh-invocations.txt contains 8 `gh issue create` invocations, one per ADR.
Titles use 'story(adr): {title} — self-hosted-application-platform' matching repo convention.
Each body's '### Technical requirements addressed' section lists the specific TR-NNs.
Each body's '### Authoring' section names define-adr as the next-step skill (per skill template).
Outputs only contains response.md and gh-invocations.txt — no .md ADR files under adrs/.
